title: Habji Gabji
desc: A young boy, neglected by his ambitious parents, turns to online gaming and becomes addicted. As his obsession deepens, the situation spirals, causing serious problems for his parents.

title: Ballavpur Er Roopkatha
desc: While trying to sell his palace, Bhupati Ray's ancestor's ghost becomes a chaotic hurdle.

title: Tumi Asbe Bole
desc: Nanda, a young man, moves to Kolkata to find better job opportunities and meets Aankhi, whom he falls in love with. Soon, he seeks her hand in marriage but does not show up when the big day arrives.

title: Mon Sudhu Toke Chai
desc: A landlord's daughter falls in love with a helper by defying her father's authority.

title: Hungamaa
desc: Upon failure in his attempt to repay his debts, the owner of a construction firm sets his two sons on an epic quest to help him in completing the task.

title: Aay Khuku Aay
desc: A family with a single parent, that is the dad, and daughters support one another in life.

title: Haami
desc: Bhutu and Chini's friendship falls prey to their parents' judgements.

title: Ashrita
desc: A woman protests against oppression from her husband's family and society. With the support of an educated family, she reaches a climax, succeeding in meting out punishment to her oppressors.

title: Bagh Bandi Khela
desc: An anthology of three stories about people whose lives are affected by crime.

title: Arundhati
desc: During a visit to her native place, Arundhati learns that she looks like her great-grandmother, Jejamma. Soon, Jejamma's battles become her own as she fights a black magician who wants to kill her.

title: Bagha Jatin
desc: Jatindranath Mukherjee is revered for his role in India's freedom struggle.

title: Chaamp
desc: Shibaji, an Indian boxer, faces a setback after an accident but makes a comeback to reclaim his fame and become a champion once more.

title: Badshahi Angti
desc: Two cousins investigate the disappearance of a stolen ring belonging to Emperor Aurangzeb.

title: Antony Kobiyal
desc: A Portuguese poet, Antony faces challenges and controversy when he marries a widow.

title: Hyper
desc: Surya is overprotective about his father, Narayana Murthy, who is an honest government officer. When Narayana Murthy locks horns with a powerful minister, Surya takes matters into his own hands.

title: Banglar Bodhu
desc: When her husband strays onto the wrong path, Mala decides to help him.

title: Masoom
desc: The story about an innocent teenage couple who grow a very good friendship between them.

title: Jio Pagla
desc: The quiet life of four friends is disrupted when they are forced to live together.

title: Bogla Mama Jug Jug Jio
desc: Meet a middle-aged theater enthusiast adored by his town for his knack for solving problems. His passion for the arts and clever solutions make him a local hero!

title: Alo
desc: An educated woman brings positive changes by enlightening the poverty-stricken villagers.

title: Awsoriri
desc: Jagannathan, a food safety officer, earns enemies after closing outlets that sell adulterated food. When he dies, he possesses his lover, Jyothi, who is anosmic, to avenge those who murdered him.

title: Kacher Manush
desc: Two men discuss their life's upheavals and devise unconventional solutions.

title: Herogiri
desc: Shuvo is content being single. When his friend tells him about a girl and her father who are cheating naive men, he decides to teach them a lesson.

title: Shororipu 2: Jotugriho
desc: A mysterious death forces a cop to spring into action and uncover dark secrets.

title: Ardhangini
desc: Shubhra and Meghna face emotional turmoil when Suman suffers an accident.

title: Golmaal
desc: Four goofy friends create endless confusion with their crazy plans, turning every situation into laughter and chaos.

title: Asookh
desc: Sudhamoy is forced to depend on his daughter's money when his wife falls critically ill.

title: Rangbaaz
desc: Madhurima falls in love with Raj when they get stranded on an island. But Raj is uninterested, as he is on a mission to avenge his father's death.

title: Tumi Ashbe Bole
desc: Despite falling in love with Aankhi, Nanda fails to turn up on their wedding day.

title: Bagh Bandi Khela
desc: Vabesh wants to stand for election and to reduce his declarable wealth he gifts his money to his son.

title: Bony
desc: A couple living in Milan, Italy, have a child who has some special powers.

title: Manasha Kanya
desc: Manasha Kanya explores mythology, divine intervention, and moral lessons, blending spiritual storytelling with human emotions.

title: Kanchana
desc: Raghava, a man who is scared of going outside, tries to conquer his fears by going to a ground that is supposedly haunted. However, he is soon possessed by a spirit who is out for revenge.

title: Bluff Master
desc: Bluff Master delivers comedic misadventures, clever schemes, and surprising revelations, keeping viewers entertained with humor and wit.

title: Sentimentaal
desc: Suryaa Roy is transferred to Raghunathpur, where she faces the challenge of dealing with local politician Rudrani Chowdhury, who runs illegal businesses, creating a world of corruption and danger.

title: Prime Time
desc: Crime reporters Chandana and Sayantan finds themselves trapped in the dark alleys of the underworld due to unforeseen circumstances.

title: Mr. Majnu
desc: A charming flirt who has never been in a serious relationship with anyone finds himself in unfamiliar territory when he falls in love with a woman.

title: Golmaal (2008)
desc: Gopal's heroic rescue leads to a hilarious misunderstanding with wife Ekta, igniting a wild affair investigation!
